name: accounting firms processing 10-50 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10-50 clients/month, regulatory compliance issues cause audit delays. We provide a compliance reporting tool instead of manual data collection and reporting tools.
problem_solved: Difficulty in aggregating and formatting regulatory data for compliance reporting.
